title: jasminum apoense
intro: Jasminum apoense, also known as the Apo jasmine or Philippine jasmine, is a species of flowering plant in the family Oleaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in the Philippines, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Jasminum apoense include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Jasminum apoense can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for its medicinal use, making it a popular natural remedy in traditional medicine.
